items.title: Salesforce (CRM) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness And Mixed Multi Year Returns
items.description: Why Salesforce stock is on investors’ radar right now Salesforce (CRM) is back in focus as investors weigh its current share price near $227 against recent performance, including negative total returns over the past year and mixed multi year results. See our latest analysis for Salesforce. Over the past month, Salesforce’s share price return of 12.62% decline and year-to-date share price return of 10.45% decline point to fading momentum, while a 3-year total shareholder return of 48.44%...

items.title: ServiceNow Teams Up With OpenAI in Three Year AI Integration Deal
items.description: Three-year pact brings OpenAI models to ServiceNow's IT and support platforms.

items.title: AI & Business Newsletter | Will AI Really Kill Software?
items.description: Imagine being a CEO who can simply tell an AI bot how to handle your company’s human-resource, sales, customer tracking and other back-office functions.  Would you still pay a software vendor millions of dollars a year for those services?  The tool is designed to make it easier for workers who aren’t software engineers to use the company’s Claude Code chatbot to automate work functions, like reviewing emails and organizing computer files.
